name: Sweet & Sour Pork
recipeIngredient: 1 Red pepper, cut into medium pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the pork into irregular bite-sized pieces.
2. Place the pork into a pan with enough water to barely cover it.
3. Add 4 tablespoons of vinegar and bring to a boil.
4. Reduce heat and simmer for 25 minutes, then drain the pork.
5. In a bowl, mix together corn starch, honey, soy sauce, and oyster sauce.
6. Heat oil in a large frying pan and fry the pork pieces until browned.
7. Drain excess oil.
8. In a saucepan, combine pineapple syrup, 2/3 cup water, sugar, salt, cherry juice, and remaining vinegar.
9. Bring to a boil and add the pork pieces, covering the pot.
10. Simmer for an additional 20 minutes, stirring occasionally.
11. Add the chopped pineapple pieces and vegetables about 5 minutes before the cooking time is up.
12. Serve hot.
